name: DLMS Meter
description: The `dlms_meter` component connects to smart meters which use the **DLMS/COSEM** protocol in PUSH mode over UART. These smart meters are widely deployed globally.

config_entries.label: UART ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the UART component that is

config_entries.label: Auth Key
config_entries.description: Authentication key. Specify if your smart meter uses encryption with

config_entries.label: Custom Patterns
config_entries.description: While the `dlms_meter` natively supports most devices, some meters use

config_entries.label: Default Obis
config_entries.description: The fallback OBIS code to use if the pattern captures no OBIS code. Requires name to be set. Formatted like 1-0:96.1.0 or 1.0.96.1.0.255.

config_entries.label: Priority
config_entries.description: The priority of the pattern (lower number is tried first). Defaults to 0.

config_entries.label: Decryption Key
config_entries.description: Specify if your smart meter uses encryption. You should request this key

config_entries.label: Receive Timeout
config_entries.description: The timeout for receiving a complete frame. Defaults to `1000ms`.

config_entries.label: Skip CRC
config_entries.description: Skip CRC check. Some smart meters use the wrong polynomial to calculate CRC.
